claims.evidence_text: common bread wheat cultivars such as “Seri M82” with average protein value of 13.1%
claims.claim_summary: Bread wheat cultivar Seri M82 has an average grain protein content of about 13.1%.

claims.evidence_text: synthetic hexaploids have on average 15.5% protein as compared to the common bread wheat cultivars such as “Seri M82” with average protein value of 13.1%
claims.claim_summary: Synthetic hexaploid wheats average about 15.5% grain protein, higher than common bread wheat cultivars.
